welcome.headline: Let's organize your treatment.
welcome.body: In a few minutes, DoseDay learns about you and builds the memory of your treatment. Every question has a clear purpose.

personalInfo.headline: What's your name?
personalInfo.subtitle: This data stays with you. We use it to call you by name and tailor clinical references.
personalInfo.biologicalSexCaption: Used for more accurate clinical references.

weight.headline: Your weight journey.
weight.subtitle: We'll track progress week by week. These numbers are private.
weight.initialWeightCaption: If you haven't started yet, use your current weight.

goalWeight.headline: Where do you want to go?
goalWeight.subtitle: Your weight goal for this treatment. No right or wrong — just a reference.

treatmentStatus.headline: Where are you right now?
treatmentStatus.subtitle: To understand where you are on the journey.

ongoing.label: In treatment
ongoing.caption: I've been on it for a while

restart.label: Restarting
restart.caption: I stopped and I'm coming back

planning.label: Starting soon
planning.caption: Haven't taken the first dose yet

treatmentDuration.headline: For how long?
treatmentDuration.subtitle: To understand what phase of treatment you're in.

medication.headline: Which pen are you using?
medication.subtitle: To organize accurate reminders and the clinical report.

consent.title: Before we begin
consent.subtitle: To use Dose Day, we need your consent to process your health data in accordance with LGPD.
consent.security: 🔒 Your health data is encrypted and will never be shared without your explicit consent.

termsDialog.title: Terms of Use
termsDialog.comingSoon: The complete Terms of Use will be available soon.

privacyDialog.title: Privacy Policy
privacyDialog.comingSoon: The complete Privacy Policy will be available soon.

errors.userNotFound: User not found. Please log in again.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use to continue.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save your data. Please try again.
